name: imp01_biogenic_DE_pipeline
app_r_label: Biogenic DE pipeline (continuous phantom; no crossing)
app_r_precision_str: Pipeline w(z=0): -1.00497; w(z=0.28): -1.00045; w(z=0.5): -1.00002; w(z=1): -1.00000 (asymptotes to -1). Direct z_cross brentq: NaN (confirms w(z) never crosses -1); CPL linear-fit extrapolation gives apparent z=+0.3889.

extra.asymptote_note: The biogenic DE pipeline w(z) curve asymptotes to -1 from below; never mathematically crosses -1; z_cross_direct_brentq = NaN. The CPL linear-fit 'crossing' at z~0.39 is a linear-extrapolation artifact.
